result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 13:     AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
                                ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc USING (agent_id)
  WHERE ha.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc USING (agent_id)
  WHERE ha.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc USING (agent_id)
  WHERE ha.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS as_of,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc USING (agent_id)
  WHERE ha.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS as_of,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(ch.oldvalue__c) <> ''
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON TRUE
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
    AND c.ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND BTRIM(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(BTRIM(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
),
eligible AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc USING (agent_id)
  WHERE ha.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND ha.agent_id <> ''
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM eligible
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
